Hotkey Panel
Default layer
Mod Profiles
Modifier key
Toggle key (locked)
Not in active profile
Edit key label
New mod profile
Confirm
Settings
Toggle UI hotkey
Global key that opens/closes this panel. Reserved and not editable as a regular key.
Label font size
Size of your custom key and mouse labels (in pixels). Other UI text stays fixed.
18
Panel size
Shrink the whole panel. 100% = full size; minimum is 1/8 (12%).
100%
Panel transparency
Opacity of the whole panel. 100% = solid; lower = see-through.
100%
